name: Graydle Slime Jr.
name_jp: グレイドル・スライム<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｊｒ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジュニア</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 "Graydle" monster in your Graveyard; for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon other monsters, except WATER monsters, also Special Summon that monster, then you can Special Summon from your hand, 1 Aqua-Type monster with the same Level as the monster Special Summoned by this card's effect. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 "Graydle" monster from your Deck.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 "Graydle" monster in your Graveyard; for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon other monsters, except WATER monsters, also Special Summon that monster, then you can Special Summon from your hand, 1 Aqua-Type monster with the same Level as the monster Special Summoned by this card's effect. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 "Graydle" monster from your Deck.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 "Graydle" monster in your Graveyard; for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon other monsters, except WATER monsters, also Special Summon that monster, then you can Special Summon from your hand, 1 Aqua-Type monster with the same Level as the monster Special Summoned by this card's effect. When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 "Graydle" monster from your Deck.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
